title: Transfer of Boards during account deactivations
excerpt: I understand that automation transfers are now prompted during deactivation of an account.  Could the transfer of board ownership be handled the same way?  This would make for a much more intuitive and streamlined proces…

posts.author: kpatterson (Kathleen Patterson)
posts.cookedHtml: I understand that automation transfers are now prompted during deactivation of an account. Could the transfer of board ownership be handled the same way? This would make for a much more intuitive and streamlined process of account management.
